description: Send KAS tokens on the Kaspa blockchain. Signs transactions inside the TEE-sandboxed WASM using the KASPA_MNEMONIC vault secret.

required_secrets.name: KASPA_MNEMONIC
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your Kaspa BIP39 mnemonic phrase (12 or 24 words). This is stored encrypted in the TEE vault and never exposed outside the WASM sandbox.
